parties.name: ALOTAIBI, MUNTAHA FAREED 769 HAIGHT ST, APT 4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94177

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Muntaha Fareed Alotaibi, Petitioner in Pro Per.

Ms. Alotaibi informed the Court that the underlying issue prompting the petition had been resolved. She explained that on 5/14/25, she met with a manager at Chase Bank, presented all court-related documentation, and was ultimately able to deposit the check after confirming her designation as a beneficiary.

In light of the resolution, the Court dismissed the petition as no longer necessary.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Muntaha Fareed Alotaibi, Petitioner.

The Court inquired whether Petitioner had considered using a Probate Code section 13100 affidavit as an alternative to full probate. Ms. Alotaibi explained she had completed an affidavit in December 2024 but encountered difficulties with the bank, which insisted on full probate.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant. The court set bond at $20,000, appointed Isidoor Bornstein as probate referee, and set a deadline of August 26, 2025 to file an Inventory and Appraisal, and a deadline of April 28, 2026 to close the estate.

The court indicated that if the previously completed 13100 affidavit is submitted and deemed valid, the matter may proceed under that procedure instead, and the probate deadlines will be vacated. Petition was instructed to file the affidavit with the court for review.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

---------------- POST SCRIPT; MAY-13-2025 ---------------------

Upon further consideration, the Court opted to unsubmit the matter and continue the petition to May 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, for further consideration and update as to the status of the 13100 affidavit discussed at the hearing.
